fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Segment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the segment to which the logged segment is linked. The program fills in this field by copying the contents of the No. field in the Segment window.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the interaction.

fields.name: No. of Interactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of interactions recorded for the logged segment. To see a list of the created interactions, click the field.

fields.name: No. of Campaign Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of campaign entries that were recorded when you logged the segment. To see a list of the recorded campaign entries, click the field.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the segment was logged.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who created or logged the interaction and segment. The program automatically fills in this field when the segment is logged.

fields.name: Canceled
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the interaction has been canceled.
